title: thelypteris regnelliana
intro: Thelypteris regnelliana, also known as the Brazilian maidenhair fern, is a species of fern native to South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris regnelliana include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris regnelliana can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall well-being and calmness.
